mapper.select: SELECT ms.id AS sessionId, ms.session_time AS sessionTime, ms.end_time AS endTime, h.hall_name AS hallName, h.hall_type AS hallType, h.total_seats AS totalSeats, m.base_price AS basePrice, m.base_price AS minPrice, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seats_sessions ss JOIN seats s ON ss.seat_id = s.id WHERE ss.session_id = ms.id AND ss.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND ss.is_deleted = false AND s.is_deleted = false ) AS availableSeats FROM movie_sessions ms JOIN halls h ON ms.hall_id = h.id JOIN movies m ON ms.movie_id = m.id WHERE ms.movie_id = #{movieId} AND ms.is_deleted = false AND h.is_deleted = false AND m.is_deleted = false ORDER BY ms.session_time ASC

SELECT DISTINCT ms.id FROM movie_sessions ms JOIN movies m ON ms.movie_id = m.id JOIN halls h ON ms.hall_id = h.id WHERE (m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR h.hall_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND ms.is_deleted = false AND m.is_deleted = false AND h.is_deleted = false
